Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Mother Nature and Nubs Groomers teamed up today for the perfect Red and Blue loop experience . Blue bird sky , perfect corduroy, and SO MUCH SNOW!

nubsNob.comments: The county and emergency services are currently advising only essential travel. We have Crew members at the ski area assessing the situation and the viability of a delayed opening should conditions permit later today. As of right now, Nub’s Nob is closed. We will make another decision by noon today regarding the possibility of opening for the afternoon. In the meantime, please do not attempt to drive to the ski area and stay tuned for more information.
